risks.message: Board has limited visible fiducial strategy for assembly alignment
risks.recommendation: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.
risks.why_it_matters: Consistent fiducial strategy helps automated assembly and optical alignment stay reliable.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible fiducial count fell below the configured assembly threshold.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add global fiducials to improve assembly registration and inspection consistency.

risks.message: Ground test-point coverage appears limited for bring-up and probing
risks.recommendation: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.
risks.why_it_matters: Ground test points are foundational for repeatable probing, debug, and validation.
risks.trigger_condition: Visible ground test-point count fell below the configured minimum.

fix_suggestion.fix: Add at least one accessible ground test point so probing and scope reference setup are easier during bring-up.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net SWDIO has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net SWCLK has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: Critical or debug-oriented net UART_TX has no visible test point
risks.recommendation: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.
risks.why_it_matters: Critical nets that cannot be probed easily make validation, factory test, and field debug slower and more expensive.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical or debug-oriented net was identified without any visible test-point component.
risks.threshold_label: Expected at least one visible access point on critical nets

fix_suggestion.fix: Expose this net through a test point, header, or accessible debug pad to improve bring-up and manufacturing test coverage.

risks.message: High-speed net SWCLK has a long route with no visible series or termination resistor
risks.recommendation: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.
risks.why_it_matters: Longer high-speed routes can require series damping or termination to control ringing and reflections.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-speed net exceeded the termination review length threshold without a visible resistor component.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this interface requires termination or series damping based on edge rate and topology.

risks.message: High-current net SWDIO bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
risks.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow copper in a long high-current path increases resistive loss, heating, and voltage-drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net used a minimum width below the configured current-density limit over a materially long route.
risks.threshold_label: Minimum high-current width 0.70 units with maximum bottleneck length 24.00 units
risks.observed_label: Observed minimum width 0.10 units over 31.05 routed units

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: High-current net SWCLK bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
risks.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
risks.why_it_matters: Narrow copper in a long high-current path increases resistive loss, heating, and voltage-drop risk.
risks.trigger_condition: A high-current net used a minimum width below the configured current-density limit over a materially long route.
risks.threshold_label: Minimum high-current width 0.70 units with maximum bottleneck length 24.00 units
risks.observed_label: Observed minimum width 0.10 units over 28.28 routed units

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: U1 (mcu) has no nearby decoupling capacitor
risks.recommendation: Place a decoupling capacitor close to the device power pin and on the relevant supply net.
risks.trigger_condition: Nearest valid decoupling capacitor exceeded the configured decoupling distance threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Place a 0.1uF decoupling capacitor close to the IC power pin, ideally within the configured threshold of 4.0.

risks.message: U1 appears to lack enough local decoupling support
risks.recommendation: Add or reposition local bypass capacitors close to the device supply pins with short return paths.
risks.trigger_condition: Component power pins did not have enough nearby local decoupling capacitors within the configured local-support radius.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Net GND uses a trace width below the fab-oriented limit (0.14)
risks.recommendation: Increase the trace width or confirm that the chosen board house can reliably build this geometry.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can reduce yield margin, increase fabrication cost, or violate shop minimums.
risks.trigger_condition: Trace width fell below the configured manufacturability threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Review the board against fabrication limits and increase trace widths or spacing where necessary.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long path between U1 and J1 (37.95 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 37.95 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long path between J1 and R1 (34.18 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce routing distance, improve placement, or treat the net as timing-sensitive if appropriate.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Shorten the net path from 34.18 toward 25.0 or below by improving placement or route topology.

risks.message: J1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: R1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Connect the affected component to the intended power rail and verify that the configured power-net definitions match the board design.

risks.message: Power net VCC uses a narrow trace width (0.16)
risks.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
risks.trigger_condition: Power trace width fell below the configured minimum width threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the power trace width from 0.16 to at least 0.5 or more, depending on current demand.

risks.message: Critical net SWCLK appears to contain a dangling or stub-like route (28.28 units)
risks.recommendation: Remove unused stubs or terminate the route at the intended load to reduce reflection risk.
risks.why_it_matters: Dangling routes and long stubs can reflect energy back into the main signal path.
risks.trigger_condition: Critical-net routed length exceeded the stub threshold while endpoint connectivity stayed unusually low.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce path length, simplify routing, and keep critical signals on cleaner and more direct routes.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long signal path between U1 and J1 (37.95 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 37.95 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long signal path between J1 and R1 (34.18 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce the signal path length from 34.18 to at or below 25.0 by improving placement or rerouting.

risks.message: Critical net SWCLK is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.
risks.why_it_matters: Long critical routes on a minimal stackup are harder to keep well referenced and more sensitive to return-path problems.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical net exceeded the two-layer critical-length threshold while board copper layers stayed limited.

fix_suggestion.fix: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.

risks.message: Net SWDIO contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal trace width fell below the configured minimum manufacturable width threshold.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.1 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

risks.message: Net SWCLK contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.1 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

risks.message: Net UART_TX contains a very narrow trace (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.

explanation.impact: Reduced yield or board failure risk

fix_suggestion.fix: Increase the narrow trace width from 0.12 to at least 0.15, subject to board-space and fabrication constraints.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests VCC is running high current density (142.9 A/mm²)
risks.recommendation: Increase copper cross-section or redistribute load current so the conductor stays in a safer density band.
risks.why_it_matters: High current density raises heating, drop, and long-term reliability stress in power paths.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles current-density estimate exceeded the configured conductor limit.

explanation.root_cause: Power delivery path impedance or placement issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Improve regulator-to-load placement, shorten power paths, widen traces, and reduce unnecessary vias.

risks.message: Physics estimate suggests SWCLK is off target impedance (78.7 ohms vs 50.0 ohms)
risks.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.
risks.why_it_matters: A characteristic impedance shift can create reflection, eye closure, and timing margin loss on fast nets.
risks.trigger_condition: A first-principles microstrip estimate exceeded the configured impedance tolerance.

explanation.root_cause: Signal path geometry or routing issue

fix_suggestion.fix: Reduce path length, simplify routing, and keep critical signals on cleaner and more direct routes.

risks.message: Digital control logic is present without a clearly classified debug or test subsystem.
risks.recommendation: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.
risks.why_it_matters: Boards are harder to validate when debug access is weak or missing.

fix_suggestion.fix: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.

risks.message: J1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

risks.message: R1 has ground but no visible power rail
risks.recommendation: Verify that the component is connected to the intended supply net as well as ground.

risks.message: Power net VCC uses a narrow trace width (0.16)
risks.recommendation: Increase power trace width to reduce resistance, heating, and voltage drop.
risks.trigger_condition: Power trace width fell below the configured minimum width threshold.

risks.message: Critical net SWCLK appears to contain a dangling or stub-like route (28.28 units)
risks.recommendation: Remove unused stubs or terminate the route at the intended load to reduce reflection risk.
risks.why_it_matters: Dangling routes and long stubs can reflect energy back into the main signal path.
risks.trigger_condition: Critical-net routed length exceeded the stub threshold while endpoint connectivity stayed unusually low.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long signal path between U1 and J1 (37.95 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

risks.message: Net UART_TX has a long signal path between J1 and R1 (34.18 units)
risks.recommendation: Reduce path length or improve routing to lower noise and signal quality risks.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal path distance exceeded the configured path-length threshold.

risks.message: Critical net SWCLK is long for a two-layer style stackup
risks.recommendation: Review whether this board class needs a stronger reference-plane strategy or a stackup with better return-path support.
risks.why_it_matters: Long critical routes on a minimal stackup are harder to keep well referenced and more sensitive to return-path problems.
risks.trigger_condition: A critical net exceeded the two-layer critical-length threshold while board copper layers stayed limited.

risks.message: Net SWDIO contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal trace width fell below the configured minimum manufacturable width threshold.

risks.message: Net SWCLK contains a very narrow trace (0.10)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.
risks.trigger_condition: Signal trace width fell below the configured minimum manufacturable width threshold.

risks.message: Net UART_TX contains a very narrow trace (0.12)
risks.recommendation: Review manufacturability limits and increase trace width if the design rules require it.
risks.why_it_matters: Very narrow traces can be harder to manufacture reliably and may reduce yield margin.
suggested_actions: Increase trace width if routing space allows.
Review whether this narrow section is intentional.

interaction_risks.message: Digital control logic is present without a clearly classified debug or test subsystem.
interaction_risks.recommendation: Confirm bring-up access through debug headers, test pads, or programming entry points.
interaction_risks.why_it_matters: Boards are harder to validate when debug access is weak or missing.

executive_summary.headline: Board needs focused engineering review
executive_summary.summary: This board shows moderate design risk. The main risk concentration is in power integrity. The highest-priority issue is Physics estimate suggests SWCLK is off target impedance (78.7 ohms vs 50.0 ohms). The current design snapshot includes 4 components and 5 nets. The board is likely functional at a prototype level, but the highlighted issues should be addressed before stronger production confidence.

top_issues.message: Physics estimate suggests SWCLK is off target impedance (78.7 ohms vs 50.0 ohms)
top_issues.recommendation: Adjust trace geometry, reference height, or stackup assumptions to bring the line closer to its impedance target.

top_issues.message: Physics estimate suggests VCC is running high current density (142.9 A/mm²)
top_issues.recommendation: Increase copper cross-section or redistribute load current so the conductor stays in a safer density band.

top_issues.message: High-current net SWDIO bottlenecks through a narrow copper section
top_issues.recommendation: Widen the narrow neck-down, shorten the high-current route, or add parallel copper/plane support to reduce current-density and voltage-drop pressure.
